title: OPERATION SAUCER #12 [Operação Prato]  reports n.111 to n.120 [1978]

text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 111

- 02. PLACE: BENEVIDES-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 11 Jul 78 – 21:40 pm

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow, matte

- 06, FORM: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 6 cm

- 08. MOVEMENT: Downward curved East / South trajectory.

- 09. SPEED: Average (-500 Km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 300m (stretched)

- 11. DISTANCE: 100m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): 1S QAT MT FLÁVIO and Mr. ANTONIO FERREIRA FAVACHO.

- 13. NOTE: The UFO disappeared behind trees at a very low angle. No noise was observed.

- 01. REG. n. 112

- 02. PLACE: BENEVIDES-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 11 J
summary: Operação Prato reports 111–120: ten luminous-body sightings Jul 1978 over Benevides, PA; multiple supersonic passes and blue flashes at altitudes up to 11,000 m observed by military and civilian witnesses.
